notes: v369 — Signal report card, clearer scoring. (1) The Strength /10 score now shows on the 🧩 Combinations & sequences too (not just the single flags and the 🪜 ladder), so every line has one number you can compare, plus the up-day/down-day splits now carry their /10. (2) Two-way flags (🔷 Block day, 🥇 Vol record) no longer show a single pooled score at the top — because they fire on BOTH up-days and down-days, a combined number was misleading (it could read 'SOLID 7/10' while the two tradeable halves were both weak). They now point you to the up-day and down-day scores just below, which match the ladder. This fixes the 'Block day shows 7/10 on the card but different in the ladder' confusion. Nothing about your balances, holdings or the auto-pilot changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v369.
